titleStmt.title: SII 20.216: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 216. (B.K. No. 54 of 1936-37.) KALKĒRI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple called Mallayyana-guḍi.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 4, Sādhāraṇa, 8, Monday. The month is not given. The year Sādhāraṇa in Kannara's reign corresponded with A.D. 1250-51. In the absence of the month, the Christian equivalent of the other details cannot be found out.
The inscription records a gift of land made to the temple of Ananta-Tīrthadēva by the Mahājanas of Kalukere on the occasion of the birth of a son in the house of one Raṅgarasa.
Another gift of income derived from taxes, made to the same temple in the month of Pushva of the same year by Sarbadhara-nāyaka, is also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaThis is engraved in
tu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti kaṁnnaradēvarājyābhyudaya 4 neya sādhāraṇa saṁvatsarada 8 sōmavā
radaṁdu raṁgarasara maneya putrōtsavadali kalukeṟeya mahājanaṁgaḷu kūrttu Anaṁtatīrtthadēvarige koṭṭa he
bbaḷḷada taṭadali mādhavadēvara tōṁṭada hatta mattaru tōṭa 1 maṁgaḷa mahā śrī mattamā saṁvatsarada puṣya
māsadalardhōdayadoḷu rājaśrēṣṭhi pāyiseṭṭiyara dharmmakkanukūlavāgi mēlāḷikeya sarbbadharanāyakaru kalu
keṟeyaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa muṁdi� Anaṁtadēvarige hagariṭagemuṁnūṟaṟoḷu hattettina suṁka sarvvamānya
vāgi koṭṭa paṭṭeya Aṁgaḍi 10 benakana yadiṁ baḍagalu jātaṁṇana maneIṁdaṁ mūḍalu ba
cchavaṭṭigeIṁdaṁ teṁkaluṁ vuṇisaradiṁ paḍuvalu
Digital edition of SII 20.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
